title: secure_zero memory barrier is GCC-specific
description:
lichen_util.h:30: __asm__ __volatile__("" ::: "memory") is GCC/Clang syntax.

What goes wrong: Code won't compile on non-GCC toolchains (IAR, armcc, MSVC for host tests). Zephyr primarily uses GCC/Clang so this is low risk for device builds, but host-side unit tests or ports to other RTOSes would fail.

Fix: Use Zephyr's compiler abstraction if available, or add #ifdef for other compilers.
close_reason: Fixed: replaced GCC-specific __asm__ __volatile__ with Zephyr's portable compiler_barrier() from <zephyr/toolchain.h>
